action_set_definitions.name: observe_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current player attributes and location on the pitch.

action_set_definitions.name: check_tactical_progress
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the quest log for the current Tactical Fidelity count and the zone where the last tactical play occurred.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_tactical_play
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a tactical play in the specified zone. Increases Tactical Fidelity count. Consumes stamina and focus.

zone_id.description: The zone where the play is performed.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_positional_rotation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a rotation action to satisfy the era's tactical constraints, allowing a consecutive play in the same zone. Consumes focus.

action_set_definitions.name: recover_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Replenishes a specific resource (stamina or tactical_focus) to avoid simulation failure.

state_description.player_stats: The current attributes of the player character.
state_description.inventory: List of items currently held by the player.
state_description.current_location: The unique identifier of the map or zone the player is in.
state_description.active_entities: Nearby NPCs or enemies and their current status.
